statusDetails.message:
AssertionError: Expected results but query failed: Query execution failed: {code: Neo.ClientError.Statement.SyntaxError} {message: Invalid statement syntax: cypher:  --> 2:3
  |
2 |   RETURN 1 AS x
  |   ^---
  |
  = expected subquery_body}
Cypher: CALL {
  RETURN 1 AS x
  UNION
  RETURN [1, 2, 3] AS x
}
WITH collect(x) AS xs
WITH xs[1] AS v
RETURN isEmpty(v) AS result
